meaning: 宇都宫[日本本州岛中部城市]
examples: Completed the total production line in cooperation with the Utsunomiya Plant.
Established the cooler fin tube production Division in the Utsunomiya Plant for expansion of production.
Operations at this facility have been suspended, and the company notes that "time will likely be needed" before operations can resume in Utsunomiya.
One of those factories in Utsunomiya, about 60 miles north of Tokyo and 130 miles from Sendai, is currently out of production after employees safely evacuated.
